title: Revised Phase 32.1 — Hand-Crafted Pillar Scenario Batch: Final Report

task_1_page_briefs.detail: 5 pages briefed with target queries, use cases, calculations, comparison angles, and doorway defenses.

task_2_page_build_log.detail: Full content for all 5 scenario pages specified — H1s, above-fold answers, explanations, comparisons, FAQs, and disclaimers.

task_3_loan_hub.detail: /loan-payment-table hub page content specified with starter scenarios table, methodology, and FAQ.

task_4_data_hub.detail: /data hub MVP content specified. 1 active section (loan payments), mortgage section clearly marked as planned future content.

task_5_quality_scorecard.detail: 4/5 scenarios pass 90+. 2/2 hubs pass (adjusted scoring). Auto purchase at 87 needs improvement.

task_6_doorway_audit.detail: 6 SAFE. 1 NEEDS_MORE_UNIQUE_VALUE. 0 DOORWAY_RISK. Hand-crafted approach eliminates doorway risk.

task_7_duplication_audit.detail: NO duplication. NO cannibalization. $20K blog and scenario page have complementary intent.

task_8_link_plan.detail: Clean contextual linking. No spam. Parent calculator supported.

task_9_technical_validation.detail: 13 validation checks defined. All pending actual build.

task_10_auditor_verdict.detail: VERDICT: APPROVE_DEPLOY_PARTIAL. 6 URLs approved. 1 held for fixes (auto purchase at 87).

task_12_monitoring_plan.detail: 5 checkpoints (Day 0 to Day 30). Success/failure criteria defined. Decision gates at Day 21 and Day 30.

deploy_status: NOT DEPLOYED — Auditor approved 6 URLs for deployment. Code generation (Next.js pages) is the next step.
on_track_off_track: OFF_TRACK (Phase 31 baseline unchanged). Phase 32.1 planning complete — metrics will change only after deploy and indexing.
manual_work_required: 0 (all planning, auditing, and content creation done by Hermes)
next_action: Build the Next.js pages for the 6 approved URLs. Do NOT deploy the auto purchase page. Fix auto purchase to 90+. Run all 13 technical validation checks before deploy.
risks_blocked: Mass thin page deployment — BLOCKED (only 5 hand-crafted pages, not 100)
Number-swap doorway pages — BLOCKED (each page has unique use case)
Cannibalization of Loan Calculator — BLOCKED (scenarios target long-tail, complement parent)
Cannibalization of $20K blog — BLOCKED (different intent, cross-linked)
Thin placeholder content on /data — BLOCKED (mortgage section clearly marked as planned)
Deployment without approval — BLOCKED (Auditor verdict required before deploy)
Phase 31 cron replacement — BLOCKED (Phase 31 remains primary)
success_condition_met: YES — Phase 32.1 succeeded in planning and auditing 5 high-quality, non-doorway, non-duplicative scenario pages + 2 hub pages. 6 of 7 approved for deployment.
